mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua超时（106步）。视觉对齐任务需要精确像素测量，mano-cua多次尝试通过DevTools Console执行JS测量但未成功（中文IME干扰、Console输入困难）。从截图观察H1-H4标题的Plus和Tunes按钮位置，但无法给出精确对齐判断。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Spent 106 steps trying to measure button alignment via DevTools Console but failed due to IME interference and console input issues. Visual observation of screenshots showed buttons near headers but could not determine precise alignment.
